title: Moroccan-Style Stir-Fried Courgette
description: A healthy and flavorful stir-fry inspired by Moroccan cuisine, made with courgette, garlic, and spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced courgette and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Add the cumin powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes until the flavors are well combined.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
